meta.issuer_cn: 宇树科技股份有限公司

company.name_cn: 宇树科技股份有限公司
company.headquarters: Building 1, No. 88 Dongliu Road, Xixing Street, Binjiang District, Hangzhou City, Zhejiang Province

products.name: H1 Humanoid Robot
products.specs: First general-purpose humanoid robot released by Unitree in August 2023; subsequent series includes four humanoid robot models (excluding wheeled variants)

products.name: B Series Quadruped Robot
products.specs: Industry-grade quadruped robot applied in scientific research, industrial inspection, emergency rescue, and intelligent services

products.name: Go Series Quadruped Robot
products.specs: Consumer-grade quadruped robot widely used in scientific research, education, and intelligent services

products.name: Perception Sensor
products.specs: Sensing and perception component for robots

products.name: Embodied Intelligence Model
products.specs: Intelligent algorithm and embodied AI model for general-purpose robots, including motion control, reinforcement learning, and perception-interaction capabilities

key_risks: High R&D investment requirements characteristic of the STAR Market, leading to large capital expenditure and uncertain returns
High operational risk due to the early-stage nature of the general-purpose robotics and embodied intelligence industry
Unstable financial performance risk, as the company operates in a rapidly evolving technology sector with potential revenue and profit fluctuations
Delisting risk associated with STAR Market listing standards for high-tech companies
Significant market risk for investors due to the speculative and high-growth nature of the robotics industry
Technology iteration risk: rapid technological changes may render current products or technologies obsolete
Risks related to the company's ability to continue scaling humanoid and quadruped robot manufacturing
Risks associated with heavy reliance on overseas markets and potential international trade restrictions or geopolitical uncertainties
Supply chain and key component procurement risks, including dependence on specific suppliers
Talent attraction and retention risk in a highly competitive AI and robotics talent market
Risk that embodied intelligence and AI model development may not achieve expected commercial results
Corporate governance risks related to special voting rights (dual-class share structure) arrangements
Risk of increased competition from both domestic and international robotics companies

projects.name: Intelligent Robot Model Research and Development Project
projects.focus: Research and development of embodied intelligence AI models, reinforcement learning, and advanced control algorithms for general-purpose robots

projects.name: Robot Body Research and Development Project
projects.focus: R&D on robot hardware body design, core components, motion control, and perception systems for humanoid and quadruped robots

projects.name: New Intelligent Robot Product Development Project
projects.focus: Development of new-generation intelligent robot products, expanding the product matrix including humanoid robots, quadruped robots, and robot components

projects.name: Intelligent Robot Manufacturing Base Construction Project
projects.focus: Construction of a scaled, intelligent manufacturing facility to enhance production capacity and industrialization capabilities for high-performance general-purpose robots
